column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Feeling a cool breeze on her face" | TEXT="風が心地よいですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Catching a falling cherry blossom petal" | TEXT="春の訪れを感じます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a wind chime (furin) in summer" | TEXT="涼をお届けします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at red autumn leaves in her hand" | TEXT="秋も深まりましたわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Standing in a snowy garden with a red umbrella" | TEXT="お体ご自愛ください" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Watching the first sunrise of the year" | TEXT="良き年になりますよう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a branch of plum blossoms" | TEXT="春はもうすぐそこ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Enjoying the scent of a summer forest" | TEXT="緑が美しいですわね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting by a warm hibachi heater in winter" | TEXT="冬の夜は凍えますわね"
